arts.ttl: Report: Arsenal, Newcastle and Aston Villa set to battle it out for 17-G/A forward
arts.sum: Marseille forward Luis Henrique has been linked with a move away from the club at the end of the season, and Premier League clubs Arsenal, Newcastle United, and Aston Villa are keen on securing his signature. The 23-year-old Brazilian has done quite well in Ligue 1 this season, and he has 17 goal contributions in […] The post Report: Arsenal, Newcastle and Aston Villa set to battle it out for 17-G/A forward appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Morgan Rogers sent huge message as Aston Villa prepare for pivotal Champions League clash

arts.ttl: Aston Villa vs PSG Betting Preview: Trigger-happy Kvaratskhelia to get among the goals again?
arts.sum: Aston Villa face an uphill task as they look to overcome a two-goal deficit when they face PSG in their Champions League quarter-final second leg tie tonight. Villa at least geared up for their welcom...

arts.ttl: Luis Enrique: "Tomorrow’s match will be very intense"
arts.sum: The Paris Saint-Germain coach spoke at his pre-match press conference and with PSG TV before the second leg of the UEFA Champions League quarter-final against Aston Villa FC, on Tuesday 15 April at 21:00 (in France, 20:00 in the UK) at Villa Park. "The objectives are very clear: to solve the problems that this Aston Villa team will pose for us during the match, and to win the game.

arts.ttl: Ousmane Dembélé: "I'm really enjoying myself in this team"
arts.sum: On the eve of the UEFA Champions League quarter-final second leg against Aston Villa FC, on Tuesday 15 April at 21:00 in France (20:00 in the UK) at Villa Park, the Paris Saint-Germain forward appeared at the pre-match press conference and answered questions from PSG TV. "I believe I'm one of the key players in the team, but I've stayed the same, as always.

arts.ttl: Aston Villa Want to Sign ‘Exceptional’ Ligue 1 Star for Emery
arts.sum: Aston Villa are showing interest in a summer move for the 25-year-old central defender.

arts.ttl: ‘If anyone is going to turn it around…’ – Aston Villa believe in comeback against PSG
